title: Fruit Trees
description: Spice up your diet with new fruits to find around the world
body:
# Fruit Trees
### Tree Fruits
These fruits can be found in trees throughout the overworld. Each tree has it's own new wood type(excluding boats) to craft build with.
- Mango -> Jungle
- Pomegranate -> Desert
- Pineapple -> Sparse Jungle
- Dragon Fruit -> Badlands, Eroded Badlands
- Pear -> Savanna

### Stem Fruits
These fruits grow on stems(like Melons and Pumpkins) and can be found in patches scattered around the overworld.
- Honeydew -> Flower Forest, Sunflower Plains
- Cantaloupe -> Meadow, Windswept Hills

### Bush Fruits
These fruits can be found on bushes(like Sweet Berries) that generate throughout the world.
- Blueberries -> Forest
- Cranberries -> Birch Forest, Old Growth Birch Forest
- Hot Peppers -> Nether Wastes

## Miscellaneous Features
### Golden and Glistening Fruits
- Fruits found on trees have Golden and Enchanted Golden variants. Golden Fruits can be crafted with 8 gold ingots. Enchanted Golden Fruits can be found in loot chests.
- Stem Fruits have Glistening variants that can be crafted with 8 golden nuggets(and can actually be eaten)

### Secret Item Names
Certain Items can be named at an anvil to unlock an alternate texture. These are usually just a meme or an inside joke between me and my friends
<details>
<summary>List of names</summary>
  
Item -> In-Game Name
- Pear -> Pearto
- Pineapple -> Bavid
- Golden Pineapple -> Bavid
- Enchanted Golden Pineapple -> Bavid
- Mango -> Mustard

</details>
